about.title: Who We Are
about.paragraph1: We are a team of dedicated researchers, analysts, and policy experts committed to driving positive change in Uzbekistan through evidence-based research and strategic recommendations.
about.paragraph2: Our work spans across various sectors including economic development, social policy, governance, and environmental sustainability.
